calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #6, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for Thomas Lucas. Joya Firenze (Sister) in Propria Persona.

The matter was passed to allow Ms. Hinshaw time to explain the fees to Ms. Firenze. Ms. Firenze stated that she was objecting to the fees and the reserve, and that she was unhappy with signing the waiver of account and the settlement agreement. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
